Anees Baqir Assistant Professor of Data Science Fatemeh Parsa Head of Computing, Faculty of CoMENS; Assistant Professor in Algorithms Giuseppe Brandi Assistant Professor in Data Science Ibukun Afolabi Assistant Professor in Computer Science Waleed Iqbal Assistant Professor in Data Science Anees Baqir Assistant Professor of Data Science Fatemeh Parsa Head of Computing, Faculty of CoMENS; Assistant Professor in Algorithms Giuseppe Brand", "study_mode": ["full-time"], "duration_years": null, "start_month": null}, "fees": {"uk": {"yearly": 12197, "sandwich_year": 12197, "currency": "GBP"}, "international": {"yearly": 25522, "sandwich_year": 12197, "currency": "GBP"}}, "admission": {"ucas_code": null, "application_deadline": {"main": null, "late": "{\"@context\":\"https:\\/\\/schema.org\",\"@graph\":[{\"@type\":\"WebPage\",\"@id\":\"https:\\/\\/www.nulondon.ac.uk\\"}, "entry_requirements": "Experiential learning At Northeastern University London, education goes far beyond textbooks and lectures \u2013 we believe in the transformative power of learning by doing. You won\u2019t just study concepts; you\u2019ll apply them in real-world settings, gaining hands-on experience that prepares you for a successful future. Studying in the heart of London gives you access to immersive, real-world learning opportunities in one of the world\u2019s most dynamic and globally connected cities. What experiential learning looks like: Hands-on AI and analytics projects , where you analyse real organisational challenges, work with live or realistic datasets, and generate evidence-based insights. Agentic AI and generative AI exercises , allowing you to design workflows, explore autonomous decision-making and understand multi-agent system behaviour. Applied transformation and leadership scenarios , mirroring how organisations adopt AI, restructure processes and manage emerging technologies. Ethical, regulatory and governance case studies , helping you evaluate risk, fairness, transparency and human\u2013AI collaboration in practical settings. Collaborative tasks , where you work with peers to explore AI system design, stakeholder communication and strategic planning. A substantial dissertation project , enabling you to develop an original technical build, applied artefact or research-led analysis in an area of AI that aligns with your goals. This applied, industry-aligned approach ensures you graduate with the technical capability, strategic insight and real-world experience needed to succeed in an AI-empowered economy.", "english_requirement": {"ielts": null}}, "metadata": {"url": "https://www.nulondon.ac.uk/degrees/postgraduate/msc-applied-artificial-intelligence/", "scraped_at": "2026-05-05T08:37:29.288468+00:00"}}

Be at least 16 years old.", "english_requirement": {"ielts": null}}, "metadata": {"url": "https://www.nulondon.ac.uk/degrees/degree-apprenticeships/transport-planner/", "scraped_at": "2026-05-05T08:37:33.151768+00:00"}}
